InstrumentOverview.description:
Security-workspace Overview (plan §5.1) — works for owned and unowned names.

Each section carries its own status so a missing sub-source degrades that
section rather than fabricating a value or failing the whole page (§15.3).
InstrumentOverview.title: InstrumentOverview

InstrumentRecord.description:
A canonical, position-independent reference for a tradable security.

The same record backs an owned holding, a watchlist name, a research
candidate, a benchmark, an ETF, or a security with no current position.
conId is authoritative when present; a symbol-only record is provisional.
InstrumentRecord.title: InstrumentRecord

RegimeInputs.description: Explainable dimensions. Any dimension may be None (unknown).
RegimeInputs.title: RegimeInputs

get.description:
Portfolio-level options risk (§11): net Greeks + expiry/assignment exposure.

Computed from held option positions and persisted as an option_risk_snapshot.
Reports exclusions honestly rather than assuming coverage.

schema.title: Response Portfolio Options Portfolio Options Get

get.description: Retrieve recorded account PnL snapshots only. Modeled ex-ante history is not returned here.

post.description: Manually record a portfolio performance snapshot.
Monthly investment review (§22): performance, risk, allocation, process analytics.
Trade-plan report (§22): thesis, action, sizing, scenarios, readiness, decision.
